decisions.rationale: Apache 2.0, self-hosted, Google Zanzibar model, Java/JS SDK mevcut, Keycloak connector var
JWT sadece sub, email, realm_role içerir. Permission claim YOK.

Permission-service is no longer a standalone authz engine but the OpenFGA synchronization hub: TupleSyncService (tuple write/delete), AuthzVersionService (cache invalidation), AccessControllerV1 (roles CRUD), /authz/me+/authz/version endpoints. Removing it would break Zanzibar. Original 'REMOVED' label was aspirational; actual evolution is TRANSFORMATION.

decisions.decision: SecurityConfigLocal: NO JWT validation in local/dev profile
decisions.rationale: oauth2ResourceServer causes 401 when Keycloak token issuer doesn't match. Local profile = permitAll, no JWT decode.
HIGHEST_PRECEDENCE causes userId=null because filter runs before SecurityContext is populated.

decisions.decision: Vite proxy: direct service routes, NO gateway for API calls
decisions.rationale: Gateway Vault fallback handler blocks some routes. Direct proxy to service ports (8089, 8091, 8092, 8095).
permitAll/fake auth is for CI only. Dev login via Keycloak. .env.local must NOT be changed by AI agents.

decisions.decision: Permission-service operational scope — OpenFGA Hub responsibilities
decisions.rationale: Permission-service responsibilities (D-003 extension): (1) TupleSyncService — role/scope changes -> OpenFGA tuple write/delete with deny-wins resolution; (2) AuthzVersionService — cache invalidation version management; (3) TupleSyncOutboxPoller — durable retry with SELECT FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED; (4) AuthorizationControllerV1 — user-facing /authz/me, /authz/check, /authz/batch-check, /authz/explain, /authz/version, /authz/catalog, /authz/modules endpoints; (5) AccessControllerV1 + PermissionControllerV1 — role/permission CRUD. NOT responsible for: authentication (Keycloak), data enforcement (each service's Hibernate @Filter + RLS), or HTTP permission checks from other services (they call OpenFgaAuthzService directly via OpenFGA SDK).

rejected_alternatives.reason: Solo developer, market saturated (Auth0 FGA, Permit.io, Authzed). Use existing OSS.
Stale until token refresh (5 min TTL). Permission changes not reflected in real-time.
Too complex for solo developer. Use feature flags per-service instead.
Sektör standardı keycloak. permitAll causes AI agents to break auth flow.
Causes 401 when Keycloak token issuer doesn't match local config. JWT must be completely off in local.

rejected_alternatives.alternative: Other services make HTTP calls to permission-service for authz checks
rejected_alternatives.reason: Adds latency and SPOF risk. Services use OpenFgaAuthzService from common-auth (direct OpenFGA SDK) for check/listObjects. Permission-service is hub for WRITE/SYNC + user-facing queries, not a check proxy.

constraints.constraint: NEVER change ScopeContextFilter order to HIGHEST_PRECEDENCE
Vite proxy /api/v1/authz, /api/v1/roles, /api/v1/permissions → localhost:8090 (permission-service hub). NEVER route these through gateway.
Permission-service is the OpenFGA hub — do NOT remove it; do NOT duplicate TupleSyncService or AuthzVersionService in other services
schema-service AUTH_MODE kill-switch REMOVED — always authenticated() in non-local profiles. Do NOT re-add permitAll bypass.
Production SecurityConfig catch-all must be authenticated() or denyAll(), NEVER permitAll(). Only SecurityConfigLocal (@Profile local/dev) may use permitAll.

Services must use OpenFgaAuthzService (common-auth) for check/listObjects operations — NOT HTTP calls to permission-service. Permission-service is the WRITE hub (tuple sync) and user-facing QUERY hub (/authz/me, /authz/explain), not a check proxy.

change_log.changes: Initial decisions registry created after full Zanzibar migration
D-003 DCP: 'Permission-service REMOVED' → 'TRANSFORMED — OpenFGA hub'. C-005 updated to protect hub role. Ref: CNS-20260411-001 (Claude+Codex consultation, Seçenek B uzlaşı).

4 pending decisions resolved (K-1..K-4). C-006 added: schema-service AUTH_MODE kill-switch removed. C-007 added: prod SecurityConfig must use authenticated() catch-all. ERP_OPENFGA_ENABLED staged rollout via PR-D (docker-compose default true). MFE standalone auth deferred (shell protection sufficient). Vault naming fixed in compose. Ref: CNS-20260413-001.

D-008 added: Permission-service operational scope (hub responsibilities explicit). R-006 added: other services do NOT HTTP-call permission-service for checks. C-008 added: direct OpenFGA SDK usage for checks. Ref: CNS-20260414-001/002 (Rev 19 consensus).
